name: standards-refresh.sh --project routes a consumer's own registry rules into the per-project working overlay leaving official namespaces untouched
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r56-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/rules && printf '

Pin dependency versions in my app

All dependencies MUST be pinned in the lockfile.

' > $OUT/team.html && cat > $OUT/MY-SOURCES.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/rules/_project/my-app/node/my-team-standards.yaml; [ -f $T ] && [ ! -d $OUT/rules/node ] && grep -q 'WROTE sid=my-team-standards' e.err && grep -q 'no_clause_dropped: true' $T && echo project-scope-routes-to-overlay 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
